metaDescription: Manage your profile, contact details and core account settings on MyHome24App.
title: Settings
description: Manage your personal details, profile image and basic account settings.
name: Name
loginRequired: Please log in to access settings.
securityText: Your account is managed via your email address. Password changes and security-related actions should be handled carefully and securely.
accountCardText: Update your name, phone number, date of birth and profile image.
profileTipsText: A clear profile builds trust with interested users, owners and partners on the platform.
helpText: If you want to manage your profile image via upload instead of URL, we can connect that cleanly to your existing upload flow in the next step.
